Class ReadOnlyStringProperty

java.lang.Object
javafx.beans.binding.StringExpression
javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyStringProperty
All Implemented Interfaces:
Observable, ReadOnlyProperty<String>, ObservableObjectValue<String>, ObservableStringValue, ObservableValue<String>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ReadOnlyStringPropertyBase, StringProperty
public abstract class ReadOnlyStringProperty extends StringExpression implements ReadOnlyProperty<String>
Superclass for all readonly properties wrapping an String.
Since:
JavaFX 2.0
See Also:
  • ObservableStringValue
  • StringExpression
  • ReadOnlyProperty
